channel.title: Data-Centers on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Centers on Archive 03

item.title: Data Centers as 'Electricity Hogs': Are Power Stocks the True Beneficiaries of AI?
item.description: As AI data center expansion brings power demand to the forefront of investment themes, we examine whether power stocks and utility ETFs are stable beneficiaries of AI infrastructure or an overheated trend, with data centers projected to account for 9-17% of U.S. power demand by 2030.
